    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    U

    unbox() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.TypeNameImpl
    Returns an unboxed type if this is a boxed primitive type (like int for Integer) or Void.
    unbox() - Method in interface org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.TypeName
    Returns an unboxed type if this is a boxed primitive type (like int for Integer) or Void.
    UNCHECKED - Enum constant in enum class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.SuppressableWarnings
    The method or statement is performing an unchecked conversion for a generic data type.
    unindent() - Method in interface org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.CodeBlock.Builder
    Removes an indentation level from the code block.
    unindent() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.CodeBlockImpl.BuilderImpl
    Removes an indentation level from the code block.
    unindent() - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.CodeWriter
    Decrements the indentation level.
    unindent(int) - Method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.CodeWriter
    Decreases the indentation level by the given value.
    union(Set, Set) - Static method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.Util
    Creates a new set with the combined contents of the given sets.
    UNLIKELY_ARG_TYPE - Enum constant in enum class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.SuppressableWarnings
    The type for the argument looks not correct.
    UNUSED - Enum constant in enum class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.SuppressableWarnings
    An element is not used.
    UNUSED_RETURN_VALUE - Enum constant in enum class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.SuppressableWarnings
    No caller of the method ever regards its return value.
    USE_OF_CONCRETE_CLASS - Enum constant in enum class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.SuppressableWarnings
    A concrete class is used for an attribute, a return value or an argument.
    Util - Class in org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal
    Several utility functions to be used with JavaComposer.
    Util() - Constructor for class org.tquadrat.foundation.javacomposer.internal.Util
    No instance allowed for this class.
